body: Completed task-graph-brief: Wired Graphify enrichment into all surfacing layers. CLI renderBrief() now displays Related files, Concepts, and Impact hints sections. MCP get_brief tool returns enriched Brief interface. Dashboard Brief.tsx updated to show the three new sections. All layers degrade gracefully when graph data absent. Added integration tests for CLI, dashboard API, and MCP. 115 tests pass, all checks clean.
